textByHash.3e968a69e7700c91d79dee89240e973a197a15b2: Hey. I heard about Persten. I can't believe it...
textByHash.92e3f373acc857e025ec556f197eab3d3e598ee8: I wish I could have met her... The real her I mean. I bet she'd have known how to properly close this rift.
textByHash.c948e14608be6394fa80ecf32b82baa644eeefc3: I guess it's just down to us though. Speaking of which, back to work I guess. Did you have any abyssal pearls you wanted to trade?
textByHash.eb08eb89873a0b5fac1e325d03e19c0f7649a12f: So, if that's six and this is eight, then if we multiply... No, divide? No, that's not it either.
textByHash.bb5956359b6909f098ed85a63ba144eb73d2acfe: Oh, didn't see you there! I'm a little busy trying to solve a puzzle set by the great Traiborn. If you have any questions, could you ask him instead?
textByHash.b7406bb7803984f7eba7d2fe482427837b262bff: Oh, hey there! Yes, I'm trying to solve a puzzle set by the world-renowned Traiborn himself! It truly is an honour to have someone like him take the time to teach an up-and-coming wizard such as myself.
textByHash.a7a2cfafb4e8d0542c04f27e58d1f32a735ccca8: Oh, so many reasons! But the biggest is that amongst all of the wizards, he is the foremost expert in extra- planar magic!
textByHash.34d1860cc509aa89efc7ca70c81067544020c7ee: Why else do you think he has the smallest room in the tower? Because he doesn't need the space! He can just open a portal to create more!
textByHash.b1c8268ae2420eb43b64da0401849c2297b72ce8: Oh absolutely! That's why I'm here. I need to solve this puzzle to prove that I'm ready to learn all that he has to teach.
textByHash.61ce282ce975a63b76edaec38c37c585f6cd5d9d: You've met Persten? She studied directly under Traiborn for multiple years! I'd love to meet her, but she's hard to track down. Could you introduce us?
textByHash.3dbe1f9cc63544d2c79352e65c2f34b8db531499: I'm not sure. I wouldn't want Traiborn to think poorly of me if I've cheated and asked for help... but I do want to work with Persten...
textByHash.ebc4a1d5de0147168a31c370c2d5f40c773f188c: Okay, I'll show you the puzzle.
textByHash.d823f2c8f6ac570b0223ca34bb417e6905a272b6: Of course! We needed to combine our puzzles to solve it. Wow, that's genius! What a great way to teach us all teamwork!
textByHash.eb8466a8d10f8522c9b7ee5bf3b241a687234ddc: I think I'm ready to meet Persten! You should go to the basement and let Sedridor know we're all ready.
textByHash.ddaf35d1cbbaa4a61fd4a518240520b1fabc9841: We won't let you down, Persten.
textByHash.4548b1d19ab27ec0c0b0b97359cefb3ee831097e: And we have Persten to look after us!
textByHash.7de724b7a7c607d05d267094121986fa8c2744e1: See the plaque on it? It reads: 'Aliya, Justiciar of the Lion and guardian of the Temple of the Eye.'
textByHash.b8b49a13dffb8cf19f7433d443328b7b02c5da9e: That must be where we are right now! I've read about the justiciars before, in a book back at the Wizards' Tower.
textByHash.502d1b273d6986f6b2d4b1e32d8c5a23c7614826: They were powerful warriors in service to Saradomin himself, back when the gods still walked among us! This temple must be ancient. Imagine if Saradomin himself once stood here!
textByHash.b1af70c88c7db0638d5f06568e774abcb2a67c49: Isn't it brilliant? A statue of a justiciar! I wish I could have met her!
textByHash.7ea616419e0cf8cea6a7bc4254eec69fe3fd6a0a: Not just any wizards, Saradominist wizards! There's some statues of an old Saradominist Justiciar called Aliya!
textByHash.07bdd8b858e184aafeb678ee052325d97d1f70a7: That's not all I found. Apparently, this place was once called the Temple of the Eye!
textByHash.dc7d308d106fcc72280246c242c8adb4b34505b5: Anything else was probably lost when the first Wizards' Tower burnt down.
textByHash.4db654c0922b098d856a9fc783456e4748c9e4aa: Amazing as always, Persten! We're so lucky to be able to work with you.
textByHash.98007fa5771b79338068eca6aa8f798964a12a34: Should we report back to Sedridor?
textByHash.35b2224d7d2d13a97ed7d5aaa9eac34dacb9e306: I... I think so. Sorry... I need a moment to collect myself.
textByHash.98c67151011fb81da27e6d431cd5e3dca55849a3: Tamara! ! I think I've found something over here!
textByHash.2065950a450961d68fa0b0764028a470b29eb926: Well... I can't say for sure, but I think the containers on this table contain small amounts of runic energy.
textByHash.e7fb1145d5867c4d13788badc8cd491775b55cf6: Just make sure you don't take more than one! I tried to do that already and the energy within them exploded!
textByHash.e342f10d5971507fe9ff81a9498bc5f9bc1b730d: You should take one of these containers to Tamara. Just don't take more than one or they'll explode!
textByHash.704cf929acd793bb6d1c1cdb74ea8a3e7805efe5: I think the essence piles here are actually remains of old guardians. They seem to contain elemental and catalytic energies. Perhaps you could try infusing each one with a cell.
textByHash.24c1280095095d59cc5e8cfdf3122226ce13587d: You'll probably need a chisel to shape the essence first. Looks like there's one on the floor there.
textByHash.f4aa93a674c3b282b3857bdd6d2220850e5776da: Try infusing each of the essence piles here with a cell. You'll probably need a chisel to shape the essence first. Looks like there's one on the floor there.
textByHash.13babfafd501b04ea77d0f0e15fff03bd25230c1: It worked! Looks like it's following the elemental symbols on the ground.
textByHash.3eca1b3fbf4cb0dcc094917f4bbbdd648e929ef9: Try creating another one using the other essence pile.
textByHash.7c4030bd65e6b0a4eb1fca2ba1e9564988f515ec: Try infusing the other essence pile with a cell like you did with the first one.
textByHash.41d584565f63327f532c4a6e03467e685640a26c: Amazing! Looks like this one's following the catalytic symbols.
textByHash.d67c83ba00d23c3c05804bdf984348659894a2a4: These guardians should be strong enough to fend off those creatures. Head back to Tamara and see what we should do next.
textByHash.c16de75957daf95d5454e5abb318e6936b89ec0e: The guardians should be strong enough to fend off those creatures. Maybe Tamara will know what to do next.
textByHash.5604ef869946f4962f460a9179039eb50386eb8c: Hmm... I reckon this old workbench here might have been used for just that. There's still plenty of pure essence on it for you to use, but that might not be enough...
textByHash.2768d2d3ca3fc55d6f3c64800b5c1b49e3383cc0: If you think you have enough, you should take it to Tamara.
textByHash.89edff83632c46fcfd5a072bf548e6345bfa5d0c: I'm not sure. Maybe Tamara will know what to do.
textByHash.a4dbff0bfa31b8027d408f1146101c2f1d629e5c: You could use the workbench here to combine pure essence with fragments from the nearby fallen guardians. The essence would then be perfect for capturing runic energy.
textByHash.6b8a134d068904872e91b8d6d6a06d5b1307c158: Great! You should go do that now.
textByHash.5c331fcb5d55999d726c992af9f5104394cfb105: Go right ahead. Just use a chisel to shape one of these essence piles and then infuse the result with a cell.
textByHash.5ab85b71294ec63673d9b31f232ab3928b226c3d: Look at that! I don't know what you did, but that guardian is much stronger than the ones you made before.
textByHash.94b6a8272ee18b76ec5ed0fcdc01e1e2fdb14470: What about Persten? We have to help her.
textByHash.4f73a10d711439a05c3e17a30aa65d8c799f576c: Hey. Got any abyssal pearls you want to trade?
textByHash.b5f7d02287c1f88211e96257ed8e13bf3fe0700f: I have my general store, but I also have a small collection of lanterns available, if that interests you?
textByHash.0a7e1fa6ab7a629a0a74a1ad431e8826ab9a8c9a: Yes, powerful artefacts of The Abyss. We have accumulated a small collection of them from all of the fighting.
textByHash.42e746d724c4efcab93936d1b10b06386fabe060: Absolutely not. We know how powerful they are, yet their magic is too unknown to us to risk using.
textByHash.4ad937951f6c9b45fb56e376cbf3c76c46e4923d: I'm afraid I can't just give you one. We're under strict instructions to only provide lanterns to people who prove themselves as committed to the cause.
textByHash.dc7ddedecf2acd54a1c87e927b97f4bf0c10a2ac: If you've fought the abyss enough to amass 1,500 abyssal pearls, that would be enough.
textByHash.f047e9a886b9cae3bdf5d4e59fa3f17cdc61005d: That's alright. Feel free to come back when you have more pearls on you.
textByHash.a4894cd7912b5a1b44a9dbd25e4699357885eadc: As long as you are aware of how powerful they are, and that I can trust you won't lost it.
textByHash.4624679cd0c613ae98dfaf8fc8daa49eb3fca013: They're great, aren't they? I don't know their name, if they even have one, so I just call them Rifty.
textByHash.054b14c03f91561697519751883c3058c86ec0c3: That rift they have is a folded-space storage rift, just like the ones Traiborn uses! Small on the outside, but big on the inside!
textByHash.2be33a0759b26b1cd01256ce561fab8790111109: The guardians use it to store things. If you help hold back the Abyss, they'll let you take things from the rift in return.
textByHash.3da1e7b53091c66cae6ed4c42b81c9a5e2b895b8: Anyway, did you want to trade?
textByHash.82adbea33156ed5d40c880a84f9fb48bae663af2: Sedridor told us to make sure there was plenty of incentive for people to help us. He also wants us to gather abyssal pearls for research purposes. I thought this would be a good way of doing both!
textByHash.dc421ed42d9643652611a78ae931673c97787cd6: Exactly! I've got some interesting things from the Wizards' Tower, along with some cool stuff the Guardians of the Rift gave us. Want to take a look?
textByHash.82eb3bffe88bde2838a8d99bb5b86e041559f181: Well, I only really know what the Great Guardian told us. This is the Temple of the Eye, or at least, what's left of it. It was built long ago to house the Eye, a powerful Saradominist artefact.
textByHash.008662b1ffddb1dcc4ed11d412b25df29c56ece5: Apparently, servants of some 'Fallen Empire' desired this artefact. However, in their attempt to steal it, they accidently opened a rift into a deadly area of the Abyss called the Scar.
textByHash.4d68b78afb9a366c783a6f0d6c5f17921dc1ed88: Were it not for the Justiciar of the Lion, the rift would have endangered all of Gielinor. She used the Eye to close it and then created the Guardians of the Rift to protect this temple.
textByHash.69ed2c46cbf0572d9a041d3c7f68931f5db13de1: Of course, the rift is open again now, but with our help, the Guardians of the Rift are keeping it under control.
textByHash.e76c6f5a576191b2904c65f457fd80686658d269: And you want me to change it to a different one?
textByHash.cd507706e686c54b691276a842c13c6be4265809: You'd be surprised at how often this happens. Lots of adventurers have been pulling bottles of dye out of that rift, only to wish they'd got a different one. I've ended up with plenty of spares.
textByHash.68982d82d4cec1caf2b811f812908984bfcb503c: So on that note, would you like me to swap your dye for you?
textByHash.0b93a2f282a2a9da401ead01b187606908209274: Not a problem. Feel free to come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.ece867989aeaeb6189cd0168657983dc0cd028bb: Oh? Usually I trade them for other dyes, I suppose I could buy one from you instead for my own research.
textByHash.b5f65ee7183f59a2708279ecccaae393e822dc3a: Which dye did you want to sell?
textByHash.530dda03312c9904e1ae6aafad5b5374034c6ae0: It's funny you should mention that. I actually found an old locket while rummaging through the rift myself.
textByHash.4578b575b80ca208c69142a012c202842a68e2e6: I'd happily give it to you, but you don't have space for it. Come back when you do.
textByHash.7226da8fadd29de96eba8ae38dfd040da0689b36: It's funny you should mention that. I actually found a bag with strange markings on it while rummaging through the rift myself.
textByHash.bafda315ae64547ee49658dfabea9fa324cc0727: Oh? Usually I sell items to you adventurers. What did you have in mind?
textByHash.662cd17fe5eda1c8234b33111a56edbc2ee42c61: An abyssal green dye? I can offer you 50 abyssal pearls for that.
textByHash.8651f4317b598521f99d22c1ecb3b866832b948b: Come back if you have any more items from the rift to sell.
textByHash.a1d81bb81b377d8506f172dbea5be0bf83e12269: Very well, come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.8e7c0ddaffe4ce4a76a84fa6a9c51c0ee61c725f: An abyssal blue dye? I can offer you 50 abyssal pearls for that.
textByHash.71e2ef3426023ed5c2165856a630cdc6ea220c03: An abyssal red dye? I can offer you 50 abyssal pearls for that.
textByHash.5aa0eae021a5045fc53c24463b1aa921433c3797: An abyssal lantern? I can offer you 100 abyssal pearls for that.
